channel.title: creations on evocations
channel.description: Recent content in creations on evocations

item.title: Music
item.description: These are my songs. 2023 No music yet! 2022 Mohican

item.title: Art
item.description: This is a collection of cool little art pieces I make in my spare time. I’m an amateur, most certainly, but it’s fun to do something new. The Monkey Collection gorill munkee tilesetFeel free to use this!

item.title: Games
item.description: These are my recently developed games. emblem prototypea scene from an early prototype. A work-in-progress. A small-scale tactics game in the vein of Fire Emblem and Into the Breach. Developed from scratch (minus SDL) in C++.

item.title: Films
item.description: These are my recently produced films. fool A little bit of a different idea this time. Tried out dialogue, effects, etc. Happy with some of it, disappointed with others. six hours shooting over three days. six hours editing, mostly fixing iphone audio. rain Short set to Green Bird from Cowboy Bebop. Decided to shoot a movie because it was raining, ended up getting a ton of footage. Learned about evocative editing, lots of zoom/pan shots, and how to get a good static shot.
